faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs to use on the simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not permitted as the venue offers its own full bar and kitchen services on-site.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole simulation session usually takes about 1.5 to 2 hours, depending on the pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Back Nine Golf is a family-friendly venue, making it suitable for juniors and youth golfers.
